---
title: "Lecture 5: EDA and Graphs"
date: 2025-07-10
summary: "Data Analysis and Graphs"
url_slides: 05-slides.qmd
url_code: csp-materials/eda
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

**Summary**: {< meta summary >}

## Readings
